founder_feedback: Video opens in incognito, so Unlisted visibility is working.
Before public release, the video should include a stronger opening structure.
Founder wants a short Hiddenova welcome/context line and a brief summary near the beginning.
Founder wants an outro asking viewers to comment, like, and subscribe for more similar content.

public_decision.reason: Intro/outro structure should be added before public release.

required_changes.description: Add a short cold open, then a Hiddenova brand/context line, then a very short video summary.
Add a short final CTA asking viewers to comment, like, and subscribe for more Hiddenova-style documentaries.
Make intro/outro structure reusable for future Hiddenova videos, not a one-off manual edit.
